# MVP Handoff Contract

The runnable MVP must generate `docs/codex/handoff.md` in the target project.

The handoff must tell the next worker:

- the active `task_id`
- the target `cwd`
- the task text
- the active `epoch`
- the allowed `scope`
- the required `docs/codex` read order
- the requirement to preserve unrelated edits and update audit notes

<!-- coding-agents-mvp:start -->
# Generated by coding-agents MVP

# Handoff Prompt

- scope: docs/codex/*.md only; read-only repo inspection

Preserve unrelated edits. Work only inside scope. Update `docs/codex/audit.md` with verification results before handoff.
<!-- coding-agents-mvp:end -->
